prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约2922→2708→1573→2553→3339名，整体呈波动上升趋势，2025年达到近5年最高位次（最难进），较2024年上升约786名 ，显示报考热度显著升温；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2024年均为49人，2025年增至51人，2026年维持51人，计划连续两年持平， 未进一步扩招，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，属全国百强理工类院校，在电 力行业具有标杆地位；该校在2021–2026年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情，声誉平稳；抖音学校热度排名未进入前100，短视频平台关注度一般，未出现报考过 热信号；投档异常文件中未见该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与该校招生专业高 度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化在2024年专业热度分析中被评为「高热推荐」，热度持续升温；电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业亦 为高热推荐。青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（较2025年47669人略有增加），考生规模小幅扩大，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已处于近5年高位、招生计划持平、考生总数小幅增加、电气类专业社会热度持续高涨等因素，预计2026年报考热度仍维持高位，但2025年位次大幅跃升后存在 一定回调空间，预测最低位次约3289名，区间2789–3789名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2922 → 2708 → 1573 → 2553 → 3339, showing a fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, it reached the highest ranking in nearly five years (most difficult to enter), rising about 786 places compared to 2024, indicating a significant increase in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province was 49 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 51 in 2025, and remained at 51 in 2026. The plan has been stable for two consecutive years without further expansion, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, belonging to the top 100 science and engineering universities in the country, with a benchmark position in the electric power industry. From 2021 to 2026, no significant negative public opinion was detected in reputation monitoring, and its reputation remains stable. The university's popularity ranking on Douyin did not enter the top 100, indicating general attention on short video platforms without signs of overheating in applications. No records of enrollment gaps were found in the abnormal filing documents. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics were rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, highly matching the university's enrollment majors and strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with continuously rising popularity. Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, and other majors are also highly recommended. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025), with a small expansion in candidate scale and slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is already at a five-year high, the enrollment plan remains stable, the total number of candidates has slightly increased, and the social popularity of electrical majors continues to rise, it is expected that the application popularity in 2026 will remain high. However, after the significant jump in 2025 rankings, there is some room for adjustment. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3289, with a range of 2789–3789.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (2789–3789), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (electrical, computer) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2789), you can focus on impacting A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Smart Grid Information Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3789), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 585 → 806 → 1212 → 908 → 1000, showing significant fluctuations. The highest ranking (most difficult to enter) was 1212 in 2023, after which it declined, with a baseline of about 1000 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province was 3 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 2 in 2025, and maintained at 2 in 2026, with no further reduction for two consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 84th in the Soft Science rankings, placing it among the top 100 universities nationwide. However, liberal arts are not its traditional strength. Its reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no records of enrollment gaps were found in the abnormal filing documents. The university's liberal arts majors (Administrative Management, English) have no directly corresponding A-level disciplines, with disciplinary evaluation advantages concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), which have limited appeal for liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Administrative Management and English have average social popularity and are not current hot spots for applications. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is approximately 48,000, a slight increase from 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 ranking of 1000, stable enrollment plan, slight increase in total candidates, and average popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly backward from the 1000 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1020, ranging from 836 to 1204.
